steps.t: Krum can be found to the north of the Chamber of the Cross-roads, near Ninknakh Faltor. Líkmund has asked you to speak with Krum regarding the goblin-…
Líkmund is at the Chamber of the Cross-roads, south of Ninknakh Faltor. The camp at Ninknakh Faltor was indeed quite large and well-fortified, and you…
